raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is reachable from the right side and applying light lateral pressure will not cause the attached pair (box_1+box_2) to slide into the nearby cup_1; cup_1 remains clear of the right arm approach path.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is braced in place by the right end-effector, reducing relative motion at the attachment during extraction of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Left arm has clearance to contact both left/right faces of box_1; the grasp does not require the claw (box is 30 cm, exceeds claw limit); box_2 remains stabilized so the attachment does not resist the initial lift and does not drag toward cup_1.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector with a firm lateral pinch/hold, ready to be lifted."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms can access opposite side faces of box_1 without colliding with box_2 or cup_1; maintaining low lift acceleration avoids tearing the attachment or shifting box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is controlled with a two-sided secure hold by both end-effectors, suitable for lifting a large 30 cm box."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "A clear placement region on the table exists away from box_2 and cup_1 (e.g., center-right area), providing enough footprint for a 30x30 cm box and unobstructed lowering.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 (the darker box) is placed stably on the table in the cleared region and released; box_2 and cup_1 remain undisturbed."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is reachable from the right side and applying light lateral pressure will not cause the attached pair (box_1+box_2) to slide into the nearby cup_1; cup_1 remains clear of the right arm approach path.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is braced in place by the right end-effector, reducing relative motion at the attachment during extraction of box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: Left arm has clearance to contact both left/right faces of box_1; the grasp does not require the claw (box is 30 cm, exceeds claw limit); box_2 remains stabilized so the attachment does not resist the initial lift and does not drag toward cup_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector with a firm lateral pinch/hold, ready to be lifted.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms can access opposite side faces of box_1 without colliding with box_2 or cup_1; maintaining low lift acceleration avoids tearing the attachment or shifting box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is controlled with a two-sided secure hold by both end-effectors, suitable for lifting a large 30 cm box.

parsed_json.Precondition: A clear placement region on the table exists away from box_2 and cup_1 (e.g., center-right area), providing enough footprint for a 30x30 cm box and unobstructed lowering.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 (the darker box) is placed stably on the table in the cleared region and released; box_2 and cup_1 remain undisturbed.
